title: Kenyan Workout Bowl
description: A nutritious and filling bowl filled with charred vegetables, crunchy chickpeas, and wholesome Kenyan-inspired ingredients.
instructions: Cook the brown rice according to the package instructions.
Roast the chickpeas in the oven with some olive oil until crunchy.
Mash the avocado and set aside.
Mix the post workout smoothie mix with water and blend until smooth.
Assemble the bowl by placing the cooked rice at the bottom, followed by the broccoli, chickpeas, and mashed avocado.
Top the bowl with the smoothie mix and serve immediately.
